diagrams.title: Double Diamond Model
diagrams.description: Four-phase design process showing divergent and convergent thinking
elements: Two diamond shapes showing exploration and refinement

diagrams.title: Waterfall vs Agile Design Integration
diagrams.description: Comparison showing sequential design in Waterfall versus continuous design in Agile
elements: Agile: Sprint 1 (Design+Develop), Sprint 2 (Design+Develop), Sprint 3 (Design+Develop) - overlapping circles
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how design integrates differently in methodologies

diagrams.title: Design System Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid structure showing components of a design system
elements: Top layer: Brand guidelines and values
Middle layer: Design tokens (colors, typography, spacing)
Base layer: Component library (buttons, forms, cards, navigation)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding design system organization and reuse

diagrams.title: Design Handoff Flow
diagrams.description: Process flow showing how design moves to development
elements: Designer creates mockups → Add specifications → Upload to collaboration tool → Developer reviews → Clarify questions → Implementation → Designer verifies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the collaboration process between design and development teams

diagrams.title: Prototype Fidelity Ladder
diagrams.description: Scale showing levels of prototype detail from sketch to interactive
diagrams.purpose: Understanding prototype development stages and their purposes
